clauses.en: Only the resting state of the puzzle, after the timer has been stopped, is considered.
clauses.zh: 只将计时器停止以后魔方的静止状态作为判罚依据。

clauses.en: The puzzle may be in any orientation at the end of the solve.
clauses.zh: 魔方在结束还原时可以任意朝向。

clauses.en: All parts of a puzzle must be physically attached to the puzzle and fully placed in their required positions. Exception: see [Regulation 5b5](regulations:regulation:5b5).
clauses.zh: 魔方的每一块必须在魔方上它应该在的位置。例外：见[规则5b5](regulations:regulation:5b5)。

clauses.en: A puzzle is solved when all colored parts are reassembled and all parts are aligned within the limits specified below:
clauses.zh: 只有满足各个面都为纯色状态且对齐的限度满足以下条件时，魔方才被认为是已还原的：

clauses.en: For every two adjacent parts (e.g. two parallel, adjacent slices of a cube) of the puzzle that are misaligned by more than the limit described in [Regulation 10f](regulations:regulation:10f), the puzzle is considered to require one additional move to solve (see "Outer Block Turn Metric" in [Article 12](regulations:article:12)).
clauses.zh: 如果魔方的任意两个相邻部分（例如两个平行并接触着的转层）未对齐并超出了由[规则10f](regulations:regulation:10f)定义的限度，那么认为魔方还需要额外的一步才能还原（见[第十二章](regulations:article:12)中的"Outer Block Turn Metric"）。

clauses.en: [CLARIFICATION] For Square-1, because of the shape-shifting property of the puzzle, the metric for misalignments defined in [Regulation 10f4](regulations:regulation:10f4) is different from the metric for the notation, used by the scramble program and defined in [Regulation 12c4](regulations:regulation:12c4).
clauses.zh: [澄清] 对于Square-1，由于这种魔方形状改变的性质，在[规则10f4](regulations:regulation:10f4)中的用于对齐判断的步数定义和在[规则12c4](regulations:regulation:12c4)中用于打乱程序的步数定义有所不同。

clauses.en: If no further moves are required to bring the puzzle to its solved state, the puzzle is considered solved without penalty.
clauses.zh: 如果该魔方到它的还原状态不需要进一步的转动，则认为它已被还原，不需要额外惩罚。

clauses.en: If one move is required, the puzzle is considered solved with a time penalty (+2 seconds).
clauses.zh: 如果需要一步，则认为魔方已被还原，但需要加罚时间（+2秒）。

clauses.en: If more than one move is required, the puzzle is considered unsolved (DNF).
clauses.zh: 如果需要超过一步，则认为魔方未还原（DNF）。

clauses.en: Limits of acceptable misalignment for puzzles:
clauses.zh: 对于不同魔方的对齐限度：

clauses.en: [EXPLANATION] The misalignment limits are selected so that they provide a natural cutoff between one state of a puzzle (without penalty) and a state one move away.
clauses.zh: [解释] 错位限度选择了一个比较自然的方法将两个相差一步的状态区分开来。

clauses.en: Pyraminx and Skewb: at most 60 degrees.
clauses.zh: 金字塔和斜转魔方：最多60度。

clauses.en: Square-1: at most 45 degrees (U/D) or 90 degrees (/).

[CLARIFICATION] When counting the moves in case of a misalignment at the end of a solve, X and Y are considered separately. Example: (5, 1) is considered one misalignment, (5, 5) is considered two misalignments.
clauses.zh: [澄清] 当在还原结束计算没对齐的情况时，X和Y分开考虑。例如：(5,1)被认为差1步还原，(5,5)被认为差2步还原。

clauses.en: The solved state of Clock is achieved when all eighteen inner clock faces point to 12 o'clock.
clauses.zh: 魔表的还原状态是指所有18个内表盘上的指针都已指向12点。

clauses.en: Inner clock faces that do not clearly point to a particular hour marker are considered to point to the nearest hour marker.
clauses.zh: 内表盘上没有清楚指向某个小时刻度的指针被当作指向最近的小时刻度。

clauses.en: The solved state of Clock is not affected by loose or popped pin caps.
clauses.zh: 魔表的还原状态不受按钮盖的松动、飞出的影响。
